::: top-banner
:::

---
title: "General Agenda"
format: html
---

## [Day 1 - Arrival](day1.qmd)

- Arrival in Santa Cruz, Galápagos
- Airport transfer and hotel check-in
- Dinner and workshop objectives

## [Day 2 - Scientific Progress and Modeling Integration](day2.qmd)

- **Session 1**: Welcome and framing of progress since 2025
- **Session 2**: Scientific and modeling advances since 2025
- **Session 3**: Synthesis across taxa and systems
- **Session 4**: Strategic discussion and next steps

## [Day 3 - From Models to Decisions: Bridging Science and Regional Needs](day3.qmd)

- **Session 3**: Working Groups - Technical Development and Regional Priorities
- **Session 3 (cont.)**: Plenary Synthesis - Aligning Technical Capacity and Regional Needs
- **Session 4**: Discussion and agreement on next steps
- Afternoon social activity and evening group dinner

## [Day 4 - Applied Science, Synthesis, and Next Steps](day4.qmd)

- **Session 5**: Synthesis of key insights and applied perspectives
- **Session 6**: Defining outputs and next steps
- **Session 7**: Roadmap and coordination
- Final discussion, closing, and group dinner

## [Day 5 - Departure](day5.qmd)

- Departure from Santa Cruz, Galápagos
